name: agent-swarm-local
description: Hybrid LLM routing: local Ollama models via WebLLM/WebGPU (persistent, zero-cost) for orchestrator and simple tasks, OpenRouter cloud models for complex tasks. Includes local model health checking and quality verification. Supports parallel multi-task splitting. Up to 82% cost savings by routing FAST, RESEARCH, and CODE tasks locally.
author: Austin

config.openrouter_api_key: Required for complex tasks: OpenRouter API key in OpenClaw platform settings
config.webgpu_daemon: Recommended: WebGPU daemon running with persistent models (Llama 3.2, Mistral, CodeLlama)
config.openclaw_json: Reads tools.exec.host and tools.exec.node from openclaw.json (located via OPENCLAW_HOME or ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)

commands.classify: Classify a task into a routing tier (local or cloud)
commands.spawn: Generate sessions_spawn parameters for a task
commands.health: Check local model availability and quality
